name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: Progress now shows the TMDb cast + character/gender steps, and the LIVE model quality tier (★ = best, 2.5 Flash) so you see if it ever drops to a weaker model. Fallback models reordered best-first so a forced downgrade always steps to the next-best model, never straight to the weakest. Key rotation keeps the whole translation on the best model until every key's quota is spent.
